covered.title: Cracked screen from accidental drop — first ADH claim
covered.description: Customer dropped their iPhone 14 Pro on concrete during normal daily use, resulting in a cracked front display. This is the first accidental damage claim under their AppleCare+ plan.

service_fee.notes: Standard ADH service fee applies for screen damage

policy_references.snippet: If during the Plan Term you submit a valid claim notifying Apple that the Covered iPhone has failed due to accidental damage from handling ('ADH'), Apple will subject to the service fee described below either (i) repair the defect... or (ii) exchange the Covered iPhone...
You will pay a $49 (U.S.) dollar service fee plus applicable tax for each ADH claim...

covered.reasoning: The cracked screen is the result of an unexpected and unintentional external event (a drop) during normal use, which qualifies as accidental damage from handling under section 3.2. The first ADH claim is within the covered limit (maximum two per plan term), and the standard $49 service fee applies.
